pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 2.6.6 to align with Java 17 compatibility requirements.
Set the Java source and target version to 17 to enable compilation on the new JDK.
Rename the project group ID from co.com.gsdd to com.gsdd.
Add JSTL dependency explicitly, likely required due to changes in Spring Boot 2.6+ dependency management or servlet spec changes.
Exclude JUnit Vintage engine from spring-boot-starter-test to enforce JUnit 5 usage, which is standard for modern Spring Boot versions.
Configure Maven Surefire plugin for unit tests with specific version and exclusion patterns.
Configure Maven Failsafe plugin for integration tests.
Add JaCoCo plugin configuration for code coverage reporting in unit and integration tests.
Add formatter-maven-plugin to enforce code style formatting.
Add maven-dependency-plugin to copy Lombok dependency during package phase.

README.md.general_idea: Document the addition of internationalization support to the service.
Provide the URL to access the service index page.
Add documentation for building and running the service via Docker.
README.md.human_impl: docker build -t earthquake-svc . && docker run --rm -d -p 8092:8092 earthquake-svc

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Rename the Spring Boot application identifier to match the new service name.
Update the servlet context path to align with the new service name.
Change the HTTP server listening port from 8080 to 8092.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/foote.general_idea: Replace hardcoded social media links and labels with an i18n message key to support internationalization.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/foote.human_impl: Replaced 'Siguenos en:' and multiple <a> tags with '#{msg['follow.us']}' and a single YouTube link.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/foote.general_idea: Update the YouTube channel URL to point to the new channel identifier.
Clean up commented-out PayPal donation form and old YouTube subscribe widget code.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/foote.human_impl: Removed HTML comments containing PayPal form inputs and an iframe for the YouTube subscribe widget.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/menu..general_idea: Rename JSF form and button IDs to reflect the new English naming convention for earthquakes.
Update JSF expressions to reference the renamed backend bean.
Update JSF expressions to reference renamed properties on the backend bean.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/menu..human_impl: minMagnitud -> minMagnitude, dias -> days, porFechas -> byDateRange, fechaInicio -> iniDate, fechaFin -> endDate

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/menu..general_idea: Rename JSF component IDs to match the new English naming convention.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/menu..human_impl: lblMagnitud -> lblMagnitude, lblDias -> lblDays, lblRango -> lblRange, calFechaInicio -> initDate, calFechaFin -> endDate

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/menu..general_idea: Replace hardcoded Spanish strings with internationalization message bundle keys.
Update component attributes to align with new property names and i18n keys.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/faces-config.xml.general_idea: Configure JSF to use a resource bundle for internationalization support.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/template.xhtml.general_idea: Standardize indentation from spaces to tabs and clean up trailing whitespace.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/template.xhtml.human_impl: Changed indentation style in template.xhtml to use tabs.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/template.xhtml.general_idea: Rename the layout component ID to better reflect its content (Earthquakes).
Update the favicon reference to a new file name.
Externalize the page title to support internationalization.

src/main/webapp/index.xhtml.general_idea: Rename the JSF data table component ID from 'tblSismos' to 'tblEarthquakes' to align with the new English naming convention.
Rename the backing bean reference from 'beanSismos' to 'earthquakeBean' to match the new domain terminology.
Rename the iteration variable in the data table from 'sismo' to 'earthquake' for consistency.
Rename the row index variable from 'indice' to 'index' to use standard English naming.
Replace hardcoded Spanish strings in export buttons with i18n message keys.
Replace hardcoded Spanish status text with an i18n message key.
Replace hardcoded Spanish column headers with i18n message keys.
Replace hardcoded Spanish button titles with i18n message keys.
Remove the embedded YouTube subscription widget iframe from the page layout.
Simplify the HTML structure by removing unnecessary nested tables used for alignment.
src/main/webapp/index.xhtml.human_impl: Removed outer <table> wrapper around the YouTube iframe section
